name: 概率
subject: math
domain_name: 统计 / Statistics & Probability / Statistics & Probability
curriculum_points:
• 9Sp.01 Understand that the probability of multiple mutually exclusive events can be found by summation
and all mutually exclusive events have a total probability of 1.
• 9Sp.02 Identify when successive and combined events are independent and when they are not.
• 9Sp.03 Understand how to find the theoretical probabilities of combined events.
